tests.name: webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/updates applies updated settings when the active graph is ready
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/updates skips updates when the active graph is missing or unchanged
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/updates updates when physics settings change after initialization
graph/runtime/useGraphInteractionRuntime wires tooltip and context menu adapters to the current interaction handlers
graph/runtime/useGraphInteractionRuntime translates runtime handlers and menu actions through the composed wrappers
graph/runtime/useGraphInteractionRuntime refreshes delegated handlers when runtime dependencies change on rerender
graph/runtime/useGraphInteractionRuntime applies the latest cursor on animation frame and cleans up on unmount
graph/runtime/useGraphInteractionRuntime skips cursor application when no container is available
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout reapplies settings when the layout key changes after initialization
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout reapplies settings without pausing when physics is not paused
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout captures the first layout key without reapplying settings
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout does not reapply settings when the layout key stays the same
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout resets runtime state when the graph mode changes
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout keeps deferred 3d init disabled in 2d mode
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/layout does not reapply settings when the graph is present but not initialized
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/pause syncs the active graph when physics pause changes
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/pause does not sync before initialization completes
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/pause does not sync when the active graph exists but initialization has not completed
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/init defers the first 3d init by two frames and then initializes the graph
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/init initializes immediately in 2d mode and stores the current physics settings
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/init skips initialization work when the lifecycle says to wait
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/init cancels a pending retry on cleanup
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics seeds the physics hook helpers with default paused state and 2d init flags
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics seeds 3d init flags and forwards explicit pause state
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics pauses and reheats the graph animation
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics resumes and reheats the graph animation
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics reheats the graph animation even when pause controls are missing
webview/graph/runtime/use/graph/physics does not throw when the graph cannot reheat
physics treats missing previous settings as changed
physics treats matching physics values as unchanged
physics detects repelForce changes
physics detects centerForce changes
physics detects linkDistance changes
physics detects linkForce changes
physics detects damping changes
physics applies force strengths and reheats the simulation
physics uses the fixed graph charge range
physics skips non-callable strength forces and still reheats the simulation
physics skips link forces without a distance function and still reheats the simulation
physics skips link forces without a strength function and still reheats the simulation
physics initializes the center and collision forces
physics uses node size plus padding for the collision radius
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle returns the active 2d graph when graph mode is 2d
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle returns the active 3d graph when graph mode is 3d
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle treats 2d graphs as ready as soon as an instance exists
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle waits for 3d graphs until the force layout is available
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle treats 3d graphs as ready once charge and link forces are exposed
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle treats 3d graphs as not ready when the readiness probe throws
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle waits for 3d graphs until a graph bounding box is available
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle does not compare settings before physics is initialized
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle does not compare settings when the active graph is missing
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle applies updates only when the active graph is initialized and settings changed
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle skips initialization once physics is already initialized
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle waits when the selected graph mode has no instance yet
graph/runtime/physicsLifecycle initializes the selected active graph instance
graph view physics message sends current physics settings on request
graph view physics message updates a single physics setting
graph view physics message resets physics settings to defaults
graph view physics message returns false for unrelated messages
graph view physics update helpers updates a single physics setting in repo-local settings
graph view physics update helpers updates a single physics setting at the requested configuration target
graph view physics update helpers resets every persisted physics setting back to the config default
graph view physics update helpers resets every persisted physics setting at the requested configuration target
graphView/provider/physicsSettings default dependencies reads and sends physics settings through the default vscode configuration bridge
graphView/provider/physicsSettings default dependencies updates physics settings through the default repo-local settings helpers
graphView/provider/physicsSettings default dependencies resets physics settings through the default repo-local settings helpers
graphView/provider/physicsSettings reads and sends current physics settings through the provider message bridge
graphView/provider/physicsSettings updates physics settings through the current config helpers
graphView/provider/physicsSettings resets physics settings through the current config helpers
graphView/settings/physics/reader reads each physics setting from configuration using the configured keys
